description_long: This is a rustic, wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed constructed from weathered wooden planks. The cart features two large, spoked wooden wheels with metal rims, positioned on either side of the frame for stability and mobility. The sides of the cart are reinforced with vertical and horizontal slats, forming partial barriers to help contain loose or bulky items. At the front, two extended wooden handles allow for manual pushing or pulling, while the rear is open for easy loading and unloading. The wood shows signs of age and use, with visible wear, scratches, and a matte, rough finish. This type of handcart is commonly used for transporting goods or materials in urban or rural settings.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with two large spoked wheels, partial side rails, and extended front handles for manual transport. The cargo bed is made of open wooden slats and shows signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the spoked wheel, slatted wooden bed, and partial side rails.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the extended handles and the open cargo bed between the side rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the second wheel visible, showing the same slatted construction and side rails.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the open end of the cargo bed and the alignment of the wheels and rails.
